title: Kroyie
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Kroyie |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Attracted to bright light''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |lifespan= |origin=[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|They arre called ''kroyies''.''"
"''Those birds?''"
"''Yes. Once they werre a prize food to the Wookiee people. Now even the poorr may eat them. ''Kroyies'' will come to those lights. Hunters therre await them.|[[Ralrracheen]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|''[[Heir to the Empire]]''}} '''Kroyies''' were a large [[Bird/Legends|birdlike]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Avian animals, the kroyies were hunted as a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] source by the natives of Kashyyyk, the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. Kroyies lived in the high branches of [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|Wroshyr trees]] and were attracted to bright lights, causing the Wookiees to use powerful searchlights projected into the sky or clouds in order to catch them. {{Creature-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *[[Star Wars Kids (1997) 2|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 2]] *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{FactFile|128|FOO 5-6|Galactic Food and Drink}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kroyie |es=Kroyie }} [[Category:Arboreal creatures]] [[Category:Birds]] [[Category:Creatures of Kashyyyk]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Food creatures]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
